joinStrategy.warehouseOwnersCollection: MongoDB wOwners documents use `email` as the owner key; exportWarehousesNdjson maps this to warehouse_owners.email.
joinStrategy.linkUsersToWOwners: Match warehouse_owners.email to users.warehouseOwnerEmail OR to users.email when role is warehouseOwner.
joinStrategy.rdsForeignKeys: Optional: add users_warehouse_owners(user_id, warehouse_owner_id) after you import users into RDS; not included in warehouse_rds_schema.sql.
